tool_args.label: Better service strategic priority
tool_args.raw_text: 1. Better service • Sustained high operational performance levels • Improved performance on targeted low-performing lines/routes • Modified schedules to better meet customer demand, including weekends

payload.claim_text: Better service: Sustained high operational performance levels, improved performance on targeted low-performing lines/routes, modified schedules to better meet customer demand, including weekends
payload.subject: MTA 2023 Strategic Priorities

tool_args.label: Safety and respect strategic priority
tool_args.raw_text: 2. Safety and respect • Continued effective collaboration with police to reduce crime and disorder • Reduced fare evasion • Cameras on trains • Renewed approaches to homeless and erratic behavior in system

payload.claim_text: Safety and respect: Continued effective collaboration with police to reduce crime and disorder, reduced fare evasion, cameras on trains, renewed approaches to homeless and erratic behavior in system
payload.subject: MTA 2023 Strategic Priorities

tool_args.label: Increased appeal for customers strategic priority
tool_args.raw_text: 3. Increased appeal for customers • Customer service centers and roaming station agents • More OMNY function/benefits • Increased systemwide accessibility • Sharpened customer info and communications • Cleaner cars and stations

payload.claim_text: Increased appeal for customers: Customer service centers and roaming station agents, more OMNY function/benefits, increased systemwide accessibility, sharpened customer info and communications, cleaner cars and stations
payload.subject: MTA 2023 Strategic Priorities

tool_args.label: 21st Century bus systems strategic priority
tool_args.raw_text: 4. 21st Century bus systems • Dramatically increased bus speeds (with City DOT) • Queens and Brooklyn bus network redesign underway • Acceleration of electrification, zero-emission bus fleet • Fast-track depot electrical upgrades

payload.claim_text: 21st Century bus systems: Dramatically increased bus speeds (with City DOT), Queens and Brooklyn bus network redesign underway, acceleration of electrification, zero-emission bus fleet, fast-track depot electrical upgrades
payload.subject: MTA 2023 Strategic Priorities

tool_args.label: Financial stability and viability strategic priority
tool_args.raw_text: 5. Financial stability and viability • Secured long-term, recurring funding sources • Increased employee availability • Realized efficiencies in operating agencies and HQ • Maximized federal funding support • Implemented CBD tolling

payload.claim_text: Financial stability and viability: Secured long-term, recurring funding sources, increased employee availability, realized efficiencies in operating agencies and HQ, maximized federal funding support, implemented CBD tolling
payload.subject: MTA 2023 Strategic Priorities

tool_args.label: Strengthening and expanding our system strategic priority
tool_args.raw_text: 6. Strengthening and expanding our system • Dynamic, prioritized management of crucial SOGR needs • Enhanced long-range planning, releasing robust 20-year Needs Assessment • Progress on Megaprojects (New Penn, Penn Station Access, SAS2) • Expanded MWBE and DBE pools • Integrated resiliency planning

payload.claim_text: Strengthening and expanding our system: Dynamic, prioritized management of crucial SOGR needs, enhanced long-range planning, releasing robust 20-year Needs Assessment, progress on Megaprojects (New Penn, Penn Station Access, SAS2), expanded MWBE and DBE pools, integrated resiliency planning
payload.subject: MTA 2023 Strategic Priorities

tool_args.label: Revived talent and culture strategic priority
tool_args.raw_text: 7. Revived talent and culture • Stronger partnership with labor • Compensation system redesigned, with more compelling career pathways • Engaged employees • Diversity supported across the MTA • Magnet for new talent

payload.claim_text: Revived talent and culture: Stronger partnership with labor, compensation system redesigned with more compelling career pathways, engaged employees, diversity supported across the MTA, magnet for new talent
payload.subject: MTA 2023 Strategic Priorities

tool_args.label: Stronger administrative support strategic priority
tool_args.raw_text: 8. Stronger administrative support • Consolidated functions reliably delivering crucial services for operating agencies and MTA staff (IT, HR, Procurement, Legal) • Hiring processes accelerated • Resilient payroll and accounting services • Improved handling of workers' compensation claims and benefits administration

payload.claim_text: Stronger administrative support: Consolidated functions reliably delivering crucial services for operating agencies and MTA staff (IT, HR, Procurement, Legal), hiring processes accelerated, resilient payroll and accounting services, improved handling of workers' compensation claims and benefits administration
payload.subject: MTA 2023 Strategic Priorities

tool_args.label: Four strategies to reduce operating costs
tool_args.raw_text: Financial Stability & Viability. Four strategies to reduce operating costs: Harness technology and data to improve productivity, Develop common standards and best practices, Sharpen management focus on cost drivers, Invest capital to reduce operating expenses

payload.claim_text: Four strategies to reduce operating costs: Harness technology and data to improve productivity, Develop common standards and best practices, Sharpen management focus on cost drivers, Invest capital to reduce operating expenses
payload.subject: LIRR & MNR Financial Stability & Viability

tool_args.label: Combo Ticket launch
tool_args.raw_text: 22.8K Combo Tickets sold since February 2023. From the Hudson to the Hamptons. Ride Metro-North and the LIRR on one trip with Combo Ticket.

payload.description: Combo Ticket for combined Metro-North and LIRR trips launched (Combo Tickets sold since February 2023)
